_comment: Template for local dart-define values. Copy to dart_defines.json
(gitignored) and fill in real values for `flutter run`.
Mirrors what the GitHub Actions web deploy injects from repo
secrets — except the public web build only ever gets the two
Supabase values. Deepgram + OpenAI are real secrets and stay
out of public bundles; they're only injected when you run on a
phone or in a private TestFlight / Play Store build.
Long term these keys move behind Supabase Edge Functions so
they never ship in any client bundle. Until then: keep them in
this file (gitignored) and don't dart-define them on web.
